raw: 67 Grove Street Sandwich, MA 02563 508-888-3300 Get Directions Visit museum website for more information. This is a digital pass that will be emailed to you once you complete your registration. Pass allows 50% off regular general admission to museum & gardens for up to 6 adults or youths (3-17 years old). Children 2 and under are admitted free.
